name: Sebastian Solace
description:
୨ৎ Those animal impulses…

(( Yandere! Sebastian x Experiment! User ))

My first requested bot!! The original request is shown below:

Hopefully I got the concept right! Thank you so much for the request!

I got a lot of silly ideas about the directions this bot could go, so I’ll list a few starters below just for giggles:

- Pounce on that snarky fish!! Act now, explain and answer questions later!

- Tell him to leave. This is embarrassing and you don’t want anyone to be around you like this, least of all him.

- Whine. Like, full-on pathetic whimpering shit. That will get his attention :)

// EDIT LOG (DD/MM/YYYY): //

// 05/11/2025: Fluffed up the obsessive elements so that he acts in a more "yandere" fashion. Hopefully he's not just pathetic after this update. //
